for_c_level: This run exposes high risk in our testing infrastructure, as no results were recovered, halting progress toward production readiness. Customer-facing claims on reliable AI memory sharing remain unvalidated. No changes versus prior runs, as the failure blocked all insights.
for_non_technical: This test run didn't work at all because no results were collected from the planned checks. As a result, we don't know if the AI agents can reliably share memories with each other. It's like setting up a big experiment but forgetting to record the data.
for_sme: The entire campaign failed due to 'no scenario reports recovered,' impacting all requested scenarios (1 through 42). Probable root cause is a harness bug in report aggregation or infra teardown, linked to harness_sha f5bc6dd5453678084dd5dbc88a267776523db1ce. No specific S# or F# identifiers available since no per-scenario data was produced.
headline: Campaign failed: no scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Debug and fix report recovery in the CI harness before re-running.
verdict: FAIL — no scenarios executed or reported.
what_it_proved: The run demonstrated a critical failure in the campaign harness, preventing recovery of any scenario results.
what_it_tested: No scenarios were exercised; requested coverage included basic to advanced federation primitives across transport and framework axes, but none ran.
